name: O.R.C. Orb Weaver
description: The O.R.C. Orb Weaver is the militarized version of the park's common large spider. It is still the benchmark melee-pressure spider among the medium web species, but now it is integrated into patrols and control ambushes.
behavior: It moves between nests, webs, and O.R.C. control zones without wandering far from its route. It still follows a territorial spider pattern, but reacts faster when it spots an opening to engage.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and forces you to respect its bite chains. If spiderlings or younger weavers are nearby, the fight becomes much tighter and harder to read.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually operates alongside other O.R.C. spiders as the main melee pressure point in web ambushes.
strategy: The base matchup still applies: respect the combo, move out of the charged bite line, and fight outside extra webs. If you let it set the pace, you will spend far more time defending than attacking.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A heavier opening bite used to lock you into the front of the fight.

abilities.name: 3-Bite Combo
abilities.description: It pressures with a short bite chain to punish premature counterattacks.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It delays briefly and then lunges with much more force.
